title: Erasmus Hareketliliği Sınav Başvuruları Açıldı!
content:
Erasmus mobility applications are now open! 🌍Don't miss your chance to study abroad and explore new cultures. Our language proficiency exam will be held on Saturday, 25.10.2025. For more information, visit the Erasmus Office or check our website/social media accounts. Take the first step towards your dream adventure!

https://forms.gle/qVjmEjn1739HZEa19
